principle: Clearforge social assets should clearly signal a subject and payoff, but quality imperfections do not block otherwise safe publication.

checks.opening: Will your meetings start getting auto-notes by default?
Can one shared board run your task from note to follow-up?
Would AI bookkeeping save you time, or add another review step?
Would you pay per resolution for support AI?

pinterest.title: Can AI Help With Bookkeeping and Workflow Automation?
